allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const html=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\);const m=html.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\);let ok=true;m&&m.forEach\(\(s,i\)=>{try{new Function\(s.replace\(/<\\/?script>/g,''\)\);}catch\(e\){ok=false;console.error\('Script block '+i+':',e.message\);}}\);console.log\(ok?'JS syntax OK':'ERRORS FOUND'\);")
